description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its width. The grooves are deep and create a striped pattern, giving the block a distinctive, industrial appearance. The sides of the block are smooth and solid, with no visible joints or separations, suggesting it is a single, monolithic piece. The coloration is predominantly dark gray to black, with a slightly mottled, stone-like texture visible on the grooved surface. The block is thick and robust, likely intended to serve as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment. There are no visible signs of damage, markings, or engravings, and the block appears well-maintained.
description: A thick, rectangular stone block with deep, parallel grooves on its top surface and a dark, mottled stone texture. The sides are smooth and solid, giving it a robust, industrial look.
description_view_0: The block is seen from a side angle, showing the flat, grooved top surface and the solid, smooth side face.
description_view_1: This view highlights the deep, parallel grooves running the full length of the top surface, emphasizing the striped pattern.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this angle shows the opposite side of the block, again displaying the grooved top and solid side.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, focusing on the lengthwise grooves and the block's substantial thickness.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a prepared gravel base
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained with no chips or erosion.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
